final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic explaining definitions and relationships between technical concepts, hand-drawn style with illustrations and text (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "hand-drawn sketch" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 手绘信息图 (Chinese hand-drawn infographic tradition), sketchnote visual thinking movement, IKEA assembly manual illustration style; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a clear infographic layout showing concept definitions and their relationships
Subject: must include all 7 concepts: AI / MCP / AI Agent / OpenClaw / AI Skill / 蒸馏 / CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, educational atmosphere — exact mood is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn surface treatment — exact paper texture and line quality is yours
Text (verbatim): must include concept labels: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve all 7 concept terms as listed; must show relationships between concepts visually
Avoid: must avoid overly technical or intimidating visual language
